meaning: adj.[鍝瞉鐩殑璁虹殑adj.[鍝瞉鐩殑璁虹殑
examples: The teleological framework of reasoning,I believe
Can evolution evolve its own teleological purpose?
Well, in line with his teleological account of justice.
In short, political justification must not begin with deriving the rationality of rule-following from a teleological conception of practical reason.
To create breakthrough innovation in cooking is not by the classic scientific method of carefully-planned-in-advance-and-in-detail research, or teleological, activities, but through trial and error.
